title: Shattering Resinous Saudi-Arabian Creme Fraiche Fold
description: A unique and exotic dessert featuring creme fraiche, honey, and rose petals, fit for a Saudi royal.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the rice flour and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the creme fraiche and cook until heated through.
Stir in the sugar, rose water, lemon zest, and almond extract until dissolved.
Add the rose petals and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with coconut flakes and pistachio paste.
Drizzle with honey and serve at once.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled and shatter with a spoon, if desired.
Garnish with additional rose petals, if desired.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Freeze for up to 2 months and thaw as needed.
Note: This recipe is best served fresh, but can be made ahead of time for special occasions.
